task:
In Google Chrome, load file:///home/user/Documents/kanban.html (a three-column board: To Do, In Progress, Done). Starting state: To Do contains `Draft report` and `Review PR`; In Progress contains `Deploy staging` and `Write tests`; Done is empty.

Reach this final state:
- Move `Draft report` from To Do to Done.
- Move `Review PR` from To Do to In Progress.
- Add a new task titled `Ship v2.1` to the Done column via the `New done task...` input.

When done, the Done column must contain exactly `Draft report` and `Ship v2.1`, and the Done-column counter must read `Done: 2`.

verification.description: 'Draft report' is in the Done column
'Review PR' is in the In Progress column
'Ship v2.1' was added to the Done column
Page shows the Kanban board heading
